hero.title: Mykhailo Miahkyi
hero.subtitle: Data Engineer, Software Engineer, Researcher, and Academic Practitioner
hero.description: I build high-quality software and information systems. I work across both frontend and backend, as well as analytics data pipelines, and connect industry practice with research in information technologies and cryptocurrency exchange-rate forecasting.

profile.summary: Software Engineer and Data Engineer with more than 9 years of experience in backend and web development, data processing, integrations, automation, analytical data pipelines, product support, and client-facing work. I work comfortably at the intersection of engineering, data, and client needs, with hands-on experience in Python, Scala, Java, Node.js, Go, SQL, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Angular, Vue, AWS, Databricks, Airflow, Docker, and Kubernetes.

science.intro: My research focuses on information technologies for analyzing the influence of social media posts on cryptocurrency exchange rates, combining forecasting models, social signals, investor behavior, and expert-influence analysis.
science.phdNote: PhD completion and dissertation defense are planned for 2026.

dissertation.title: Information technology for determining the influence of social media posts on cryptocurrency exchange rates
dissertation.status: PhD dissertation in its final stage, with completion expected in 2026

researchAreas: Analysis of expert influence in social media
Statistical data processing for forecast quality control

milestones.title: Start of the main dissertation publication track
milestones.description: Published the first results on publication analysis for cryptocurrency exchange-rate forecasting and formalized the initial system approach.

milestones.title: Expansion of the forecasting model through expert ranking
milestones.description: Developed and published methods for forecasting cryptocurrency exchange rates based on ranked expert opinions and signals from social media.

milestones.title: Expansion of the research to communities and investor behavior
milestones.description: Published studies on the influence of social-media communities and a dynamic model of currency exchange based on investor behavior.

milestones.title: Completion of the dissertation's algorithmic results
milestones.organization: Adaptive Systems of Automatic Control and conference proceedings
milestones.description: Added results on ranked groups of experts, time-interval analysis, and mathematical models for assessing expert qualities.

milestones.title: Planned PhD completion
milestones.organization: National Technical University of Ukraine "Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute"
milestones.description: Preparation for the final dissertation defense in Information Systems and Technologies.

professional.intro: My professional path spans backend development, web development, integrations, data processing, analytical pipelines, automation, and delivery support across product and client-facing environments.

experiences.summary: Worked on client-facing data-engineering tasks and solution delivery following the acquisition of Demyst.
achievements: Developed and maintained data pipelines for client delivery and analytical processes
Created and supported jobs for structured and semi-structured data processing
Worked with AWS, Airflow, Spark, SQL, and Jupyter-based workflows
Performed data analysis, validation, incident investigation, and reporting
Supported troubleshooting in production and monitored delivery quality

experiences.summary: Worked across backend and frontend, connectors, and client delivery in a data-intensive environment focused on aggregating information from multiple sources.
achievements: Developed custom connectors and integration logic for external systems and APIs
Supported backend services and platform capabilities
Contributed to frontend updates and new platform development
Handled data processing, issue analysis, reporting, and delivery tracking
Helped with onboarding and mentoring new colleagues

experiences.summary: Worked on integrating new products into an existing production platform.
achievements: Supported existing platform functionality
Developed adapters and integration components for new clients
Participated in product integration and platform enhancement tasks

experiences.position: Software Engineer / Automation Test Engineer / Data Engineer
experiences.summary: Worked on software development, automation, testing, and data-related tasks across multiple workflows.
achievements: Built automation tools and bots for testing platform behavior
Simulated manual user actions and validated platform workflows
Worked on data collection and processing
Supported cloud-based and data-oriented workflows

experiences.position: Software Engineer / Data Engineer / Team Lead
experiences.summary: Worked on e-commerce systems, ERP/CMS solutions, and knowledge-oriented platforms across frontend, backend, databases, and integrations.
achievements: Developed frontend and backend functionality for web systems
Built and supported e-commerce platforms with custom business logic
Developed ERP and CMS modules and internal systems
Worked with databases, APIs, testing, bug fixing, and support
Built selected system components from scratch and shared technical knowledge

personal.intro: Outside my core solution-delivery work, I enjoy building practical tools, exploring complex problems, and combining engineering curiosity with long-term academic goals.

hobbies.title: Research and academic writing
hobbies.description: I enjoy turning technical ideas into structured papers, experiments, and dissertation-level results.

hobbies.title: Personal engineering projects
hobbies.description: I enjoy creating small systems, integrations, and experiments that strengthen both product thinking and technical depth.

hobbies.title: Continuous learning
hobbies.description: I regularly deepen my skills in data engineering, software architecture, analytics, and modern development tools.
